featured_messiax.headline: Find the Peace That Was Missing in Your Life
featured_messiax.description: Messiax is your AI-powered spiritual companion, trained on 5 sacred books. No matter your faith, you will be respected and guided according to YOUR tradition.
featured_messiax.mockup_subtitle:
Your spiritual companion
Multi-religious • Respectful • Always present

featured_surveyflow.headline: Stop Guessing, Start Knowing Your Customers
featured_surveyflow.description: SurveyFlow.ai transforms feedback into actionable insights instantly. AI creates surveys, analyzes responses, and delivers insights that actually drive decisions.
featured_surveyflow.highlight_1: 🚀 Surveys ready in seconds, not hours
featured_surveyflow.mockup_subtitle:
AI-Powered Survey Intelligence
Smart • Fast • Insightful

featured_psychox.headline: Your Mental Wellness Journey Starts Here
featured_psychox.description: PsychoX.app is your AI-powered psychological support companion available 24/7. Get evidence-based guidance, mood tracking, and personalized support whenever you need it.
featured_psychox.highlight_4: 🤝 Professional support when you need it
featured_psychox.mockup_subtitle:
AI Psychological Support
Private • Secure • Always Here

featured_datagpt.headline: Talk to Your Data Like a Human
featured_datagpt.description: DataGPT is your conversational AI analyst that turns complex data questions into instant insights. No SQL required—just ask in plain language and get answers in seconds, not weeks.
featured_datagpt.highlight_1: 📊 Query billions of rows in fractions of a second
featured_datagpt.highlight_3: 🧠 Root cause analysis and anomaly detection
featured_datagpt.mockup_subtitle:
Conversational AI Analyst
Fast • Intelligent • Accessible

featured_ccoinx.headline: Convert Prices in Real Time—Point Your Camera
featured_ccoinx.description: Ccoinx.ai is the camera currency converter. Point at prices in foreign currency and see real-time conversion overlaid on the image. 100% local OCR, full privacy.
featured_ccoinx.mockup_subtitle:
Camera Currency Converter
Private • Fast • Local

featured_tranquilopa.headline: Find Businesses and Services You Can Trust
featured_tranquilopa.description: Tranquilopa is Paraguay's trusted platform. Search, discover and rate businesses and services. Thousands of registered businesses and real reviews to help you decide with confidence.
featured_tranquilopa.mockup_subtitle:
Paraguay's Trusted Platform
Search • Discover • Rate

featured_aiteam.headline: Orchestrate AI agents in a pixel-art visual dashboard
featured_aiteam.description: AITEAM-X is INOSX's open-source dashboard to monitor and chat with AI agents in real time—with streaming chat, Memory Vault, diff review, and native Cursor integration (CLI and ACP).
featured_aiteam.highlight_1: Virtual office with rooms and agent status
featured_aiteam.highlight_2: Memory Vault with search and context injection
featured_aiteam.mockup_subtitle:
Dashboard for AI agents
Visual • Open source • Cursor

services.title: AI Services
services.intro: INOSX builds practical, production-grade AI solutions that transform data, processes, and systems into measurable outcomes. Our portfolio blends automation, analytics, security, and multi-agent orchestration to drive efficiency, innovation, and competitiveness.

ai_agents.title: INOSX AI Agents
ai_agents.description: Autonomous agents that eliminate repetitive work and connect platforms end‑to‑end.
ai_agents.capability_1: Auto-integration with ERPs, CRMs, databases, and APIs
ai_agents.capability_2: End-to-end process execution with error reduction
ai_agents.capability_4: Continuous learning and adaptation to business needs

security.title: INOSX CyberAI Security
security.capability_1: Continuous monitoring across systems and networks

knowledge.title: INOSX Knowledge Agents
knowledge.description: Document- and knowledge-centric agents for internal repositories.
knowledge.capability_1: Automatic indexing and reading of corporate documents
knowledge.capability_2: Contextual, semantic search over knowledge bases
knowledge.capability_3: Integrations with SharePoint, Confluence, Google Drive, and more
knowledge.benefit_1: Less time spent searching for information

orchestration.title: INOSX AI Orchestration
orchestration.description: Orchestrates complex workflows across multiple AI agents.
orchestration.capability_2: Integrates ERP, CRM, customer support, and operations
orchestration.capability_3: Full governance and traceability of executions
orchestration.benefit_3: Flexibility to evolve with business strategy

vision.title: INOSX Vision Robotics
vision.description: Advanced robotic solutions powered by 3D vision and visual language models for autonomous operations.
vision.capability_2: Visual language model integration for natural interaction
vision.capability_4: Real-time decision making with computer vision
vision.benefit_2: Reduced human intervention in complex tasks

services.value_text: With INOSX solutions, your organization partners with AI—not just uses it. Our products reduce costs, increase efficiency, democratize data access, protect digital assets, and orchestrate complex processes at scale—creating a faster, safer, and more competitive business.

surveyflow.hero_subtitle: Create intelligent surveys in seconds, analyze responses with AI, and get insights that actually drive decisions. No data science degree required.
surveyflow.feature1_desc: Describe what you want to learn, and AI generates a complete survey with optimized questions in seconds.
surveyflow.feature2_desc: AI automatically summarizes thousands of responses, identifies trends, and surfaces actionable insights.
surveyflow.feature3_desc: Target surveys based on user behavior, attributes, and journey stage. Get feedback at the perfect moment.
surveyflow.feature4_desc: Drag-and-drop editor with full brand control. Match your colors, fonts, and style—no design skills needed.
surveyflow.feature5_desc: Deploy surveys in 50+ languages simultaneously. AI translates and adapts questions for cultural context.
surveyflow.feature6_desc: Watch responses flow in live. Get instant notifications on critical feedback that needs immediate action.
surveyflow.step1_desc: Simply describe your research goal: "I want to understand why users abandon checkout" or "Measure customer satisfaction after support calls." AI does the rest.
surveyflow.step2_desc: Get a complete survey draft with research-backed questions, optimal question types, and smart skip logic—ready to launch in seconds.
surveyflow.step3_desc: Target specific users based on behavior, trigger surveys at key moments, and personalize the experience. Maximize response rates.
surveyflow.step4_desc: AI analyzes every response, identifies patterns, and delivers clear recommendations. See what matters, skip the spreadsheets.
surveyflow.final_cta_title: Ready to Stop Guessing and Start Knowing?
surveyflow.final_cta_subtitle: Join 500+ companies using SurveyFlow to make data-driven decisions with confidence.
